description: Complete data infrastructure for ML training. Stories are broken down to avoid context rot within single Ralph iterations.

userStories.title: Database schema for historical match data
userStories.description: Create PostgreSQL schema for all historical data with time-travel correctness.
acceptanceCriteria: Create migration: fixtures_historical (fixture_id PK, league_id, season, round, date, venue, home_team_id, away_team_id, home_score, away_score, status)
Create migration: lineups_historical (fixture_id FK, team_id, formation, lineup_type, players JSONB)
Create migration: injuries_historical (fixture_id FK, player_id, injury_type, reason, expected_return, valid_at timestamp)
All tables include: data_source, ingested_at, updated_at columns
Add indexes on: fixture date, fixture_id, player_id, team_id, season+league
Migration runs successfully on local DB
userStories.notes: Foundation - must complete first. Keep schema simple, add columns later if needed. Could not run scripts/init_db.py because python-dotenv is missing and pip is blocked by PEP 668; schema updates made manually.

userStories.title: FBref scraper - fixtures and team stats
userStories.description: Scrape EPL fixtures and team-level statistics from FBref using soccerdata.
acceptanceCriteria: Use soccerdata library with FBref reader
Scrape team season stats (xG, xGA, shots, possession, PPDA)
Rate limiting: 3-5 second delay between requests
Cache data locally to JSON before DB insert
userStories.notes: Implemented script with caching + rate limiting. Quality checks not run (pytest missing in environment).

userStories.title: FBref scraper - player stats and DB insertion
userStories.description: Extend FBref scraper for player stats and insert all data to DB.
acceptanceCriteria: Add player season stats scraping to scripts/scrape_fbref_historical.py
Player metrics: xG, xA, shots, key passes, progressive passes/carries, tackles, interceptions
Insert team stats to team_match_stats table
Insert player stats to player_season_stats table
Validation: Print fixtures_count, teams_count, players_count, completeness %
userStories.notes: Adds player season stats caching and DB inserts for fixtures/team stats/player stats. pytest run failed due to TimeTravelViolationError not matching test expectations in tests/test_time_travel_guards.py (unrelated).

userStories.title: Transfermarkt dataset import (market values + injuries)
userStories.description: Import pre-scraped Transfermarkt dataset for player values and injury history.
acceptanceCriteria: Import injury history to player_injuries_historical table
Fuzzy match player names to FBref IDs (using rapidfuzz)
userStories.notes: Implemented import script with Transfermarkt download, rapidfuzz player mapping, and DB inserts for market values + injuries. pytest still fails in tests/test_time_travel_guards.py due to TimeTravelViolationError mismatch (pre-existing).

userStories.title: Football-Data.co.uk odds download
userStories.description: Download historical closing odds from Football-Data.co.uk CSV files.
acceptanceCriteria: Parse: Date, HomeTeam, AwayTeam, FTHG, FTAG, FTR
Parse odds: B365H/D/A, PSH/D/A, WHH/D/A (all available bookmakers)
Map team names to team_ids (handle variations)
Insert to odds_snapshots with snapshot_timestamp = match_date - 1h
userStories.notes: Direct CSV download - easy and reliable. No rate limiting needed. pytest fails in tests/test_time_travel_guards.py due to TimeTravelViolationError not matching expected exception (pre-existing).

userStories.title: Player impact metrics calculator
userStories.description: Calculate per-90 impact metrics and replacement value for each player.
acceptanceCriteria: Calculate per-90: xg, xa, key_passes, progressive_passes, tackles, interceptions
Find typical replacement: most-played backup in same position
Unit test with Salah, Haaland, Van Dijk
userStories.notes: Implemented player impact metrics with replacement deltas and unit tests for Salah, Haaland, Van Dijk. Tests not run (per instructions).

userStories.title: Feature engineering - rest days and schedule
userStories.description: Calculate rest and schedule congestion features for each match.
acceptanceCriteria: Calculate: home_rest_days, away_rest_days (days since last match)
Calculate: matches_in_last_7d, matches_in_last_14d for each team
All features use ONLY data before match (time-travel safe)
userStories.notes: Implemented derive_rest_features with time-travel safe queries and script to backfill per-season rest features.

userStories.title: Feature engineering - form and H2H
userStories.description: Calculate form (last 5 matches) and head-to-head features.
acceptanceCriteria: Form last 5: points, goals_for, goals_against, xg, xga, clean_sheets
H2H last 5: home_wins, draws, away_wins, avg_goals
Validation: form uses exactly 5 previous matches
userStories.notes: Added form, H2H, and league position features with time-travel safe queries.

userStories.title: Lineup strength calculator
userStories.description: Calculate starting XI quality metrics from lineups.
acceptanceCriteria: Handle missing lineups: use recent typical XI
userStories.notes: Implemented lineup strength calculator with lineup fallback, ratings, market values, and per-90 strength aggregation.

userStories.title: Injury impact calculator
userStories.description: Adjust team xG/xGA based on injured players.
acceptanceCriteria: Get injured players from injuries_historical (valid_at < fixture_date)
Sum offensive impact: missing attackers xg_loss
Sum defensive impact: missing defenders defensive_loss
userStories.notes: Depends on DATA-005 (player impact). Diminishing returns for multiple injuries.

userStories.title: Data completeness validator
userStories.description: Validate data coverage and identify gaps.
acceptanceCriteria: Check: player stats and market values coverage (%)
userStories.notes: Run after all ingestion complete. Reveals gaps to fix.

userStories.title: Time-travel correctness tests
userStories.description: Test suite to guarantee no future data leakage.
acceptanceCriteria: Test: injuries valid_at < fixture_date for all
Test: form features use only prior matches
Test: no match_outcomes fields used in features
Tests fail loudly with clear messages
userStories.notes: CRITICAL. Run in CI. One violation ruins training data.

userStories.title: Backfill orchestrator script
userStories.description: One command to run entire backfill pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: Stages: FBref → Transfermarkt → Odds → Features → Validation

userStories.title: ML dataset export (train/val/test)
userStories.description: Export data to ML-ready format with temporal split.
acceptanceCriteria: One row per fixture: features + labels
Labels: home_score, away_score, result, home_xg, away_xg
Filter: exclude fixtures with >20% missing features
userStories.notes: Final step. No data leakage between splits.

userStories.title: Real-time ingestion framework (stubs)
userStories.description: Framework for future real-time data from paid APIs.
acceptanceCriteria: Abstract APIAdapter class with fetch_fixtures(), fetch_lineups(), fetch_odds()
Config file for API keys and rate limits
userStories.notes: Stubs only - actual API integration later when we have keys.
